title: Nutella Tricks
about: Nutella Tricks or Nutella Class refers to memes based on a viral post by X / Twitter user @kaiincloud sharing a video of Instagram user the_noahnator putting a mixer into a jar of Nutella, writing, "Nutella tricks you're never taught in school." The post was made in late January 2026, and the catchphrase and idea of Nutella tricks being taught in school inspired memes over the following days, including recaption edits and image macros , referencing the original post.
origin: On January 24th, 2026, X [1] user @kaiincloud reposted a video by Instagram [2] user the_noahnator, writing, "Nutella tricks you're never taught in school," where he offers a Nutella life hack that involves putting a hand mixer into a jar of Nutella to soften its texture. The post gained over 1,100 likes and 5.9 million views in two days.
